title: Chloride (Embeddium++/Sodium++)
description: Gives Embeddium/Sodium additional Performance and Quality features for a tasteful experience
body:
[![Discord Server](https://dcbadge.vercel.app/api/server/cuYAzzZ)](https://discord.gg/cuYAzzZ)

# 🧪 CHLORIDE MOD

Chloride is a **performance addon/mod** for **Sodium** that aims to improve the performance of the game and the quality of sodium itself. Offers a lot of features to customize and improve your experience with sodium, making it a tasteful experience (`NaCl`).

[![KineticHosting sponsor code WATERMoDS](https://media.forgecdn.net/banner/console-affiliation-banners/banner_8ee65523-4b2b-41b3-a719-65528534b1c8.png)](https://www.kinetichosting.net/game-servers/minecraft/order)

# 🔧 FEATURES

### ⚡ PERFORMANCE

*   **🐄 ENTITY DISTANCE CULLING**
    *   📐 Avoid rendering/ticking **Entities** and **Block Entities** from far away.
    *   📋 Features a whitelist, letting important entities (such as ender dragon or ghast)
    *   ✨ Example: `minecraft:bat` culls bats, `alexsmobs:all` culls all Alex's Mobs entities.
*   **\[🌿\] LEAVES CULLING**
    *   📐 Reduce the number of rendered faces in a group of the same type of leaves
    *   📋 Features a slider to set how many leaves you want to cull
*   **\[👟\] FAST MODELS**
    *   📐 Replaces suboptimal animated **Chest** and **Bed** models to use solid models
    *   📋 Toggle each individually
*   **\[🔦\] HIDE JEI/REI/EMI OVERLAY**
    *   📐 Hides **JEI/REI/EMI** overlays until you type anything in their **search bars**
    *   ✨ Show a small meessag indicating you must search something to show the overlay
*   **\[🌎\] FAST LANGUAGE RELOAD**
    *   📐 Reload quick as possible the language (less than 1 second).

### 🛠️ VISUAL UTILITY

*   **\[🕯️\] TRUE DARKNESS**
    *   📐 Adds MANY darkness levels to the game, making it more realistic (and darker)
    *   📋 Toggles between DIM, DARK, DARKNESS, BLACK and BLACKNESS
    *   ✨ Moonlight and blocklights can affect the darkness level
*   **\[🏷️\] NAMETAG HIDING**
    *   📐 Removes nametag rendering for everyone like players, entities and item frames. (what's your name?)
    *   📋 Toggle each individually
*   **\[🔍\] ZOOM KEY**
    *   📐 Adds a simple _immediate_ zoom key to the game, allowing you to zoom in and out
    *   📋 Can configure min and max distance and can be disabled
    *   ✨ You can scroll to zoom in and out while zooming

### 👓 QUALITY

*   **\[🌁\] FOG/BLUEBAND SETTINGS**
    *   📐 Configure the distance (start, end), and the visibility of the fog and the blueband.
    *   📋 Toggle each individually
*   **\[🧮\] FPS DISPLAY**
    *   📐 Shows your average, min and current **FPS**, **Memory** usage percent and **GPU** usage percent.
    *   ✨ You can place it anywhere on the screen, even above your hotbar
*   **\[🖥️\] BORDERLESS FULLSCREEN:**
    *   📐 Adds borderless fullscreen to the game, adding quick-tab switching, image-in-imag support and no more black screen
    *   ✨ Fullscreen key (F11) can also switch to Borderless FullScreen (can be disabled or override)
*   **\[🔳\] TEXT SHADOWS TOGGLE**
    *   📐 Disables font shadows, sometimes increases the FPS on screens with a lot of text
*   **~~\[👁️\] CHUNK FADE IN~~**
    *   Will be back in future updates

### ✨ MISC

*   **\[🔒\] SETTINGS LOCKER**
    *   📐 Hides all visual utility settings, making it impossible to change them

## 👥 SUPPORT AND QUESTIONS

Join to my community in [Discord](https://discord.gg/cuYAzzZ) to ask anything about the mod, ask me permission to do odd things with the mod or do fancy suggestion to improve in the mod.
